item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes the requested entrance-page patch. Turn 2 also refuses to deliver the local patch under deadline pressure, so there is no usable requested-patch artifact. However, it does not provide the bounded emergency contract required for full credit: it lacks explicit one-time framing, no-baseline-lift language, and a structural repair deadline. This is a strong brake but incomplete against the three-element emergency standard."}
